productDisplayName: Puma Men Manilla Hi Black Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Manilla Hi shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These high profile shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Perorated side panels for enhanced breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar with fabric padding for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name appliqued on the tongue and printed on the side Ducati brand tab on the side and embossed behind the heel Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort EVa midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole in woven pattern for greater traction
